# FFERR_UNSUPPORTEDAXIS | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Force Feedback ](/documentation/forcefeedback)

- [ FFERR_UNSUPPORTEDAXIS ](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_unsupportedaxis)

-  FFERR_UNSUPPORTEDAXIS 

Global Variable# FFERR_UNSUPPORTEDAXIS

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFERR_UNSUPPORTEDAXIS: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_unsupportedaxis#Discussion)

The effect includes one or more axes that the device does not support.
